_comment: Flow 03 — US full pattern at Palo Alto KPAO (FAA phraseology). Mirrors docs/howto_us_procedure_example.md §1 (inbound pattern) plus a full departure on the ground side. Key US differences vs. EU: 'altimeter' (inHg) instead of 'QNH' (hPa), 'taxi via Alpha, hold short runway X' instead of 'holding point', 'taxi to the ramp' instead of 'general aviation parking'.
name: US pattern — KPAO Palo Alto

context.callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo

say.text: Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo at the ramp ready to taxi

say.note: Step 2 — Ground: holding short, ready for departure (pattern)
say.text: Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo holding short ready for departure
Palo Alto Tower November One Two Three Alpha Bravo ready for departure
November One Two Three Alpha Bravo midfield left downwind
November One Two Three Alpha Bravo on final full stop

say.note: Step 6 — Tower: runway vacated, handoff to Ground
say.text: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo clear of the runway

say.note: Step 7 — Ground: taxi to the ramp (US phraseology)
say.text: Palo Alto Ground November One Two Three Alpha Bravo request taxi to the ramp
